title: Fix BLE app owner/session lock ordering
description: During MeshCore BLE owner migration, review found a lock-order risk introduced by owner-managed connection validation: surface write paths can hold a surface session mutex while calling ble_app_owner_conn_ref(), while owner callbacks hold the owner mutex before invoking surface callbacks that take the session mutex. Fix Meshtastic and MeshCore write validation so owner connection matching happens before the surface session mutex is acquired.
acceptance_criteria: Meshtastic and MeshCore BLE write paths no longer call ble_app_owner_conn_ref() while holding their surface session mutexes; native_sim tests for meshtastic_ble, meshcore_ble, and shared owner still pass.
notes:
Fixed lock ordering for BLE app-owner connection validation. Meshtastic and MeshCore write paths now call the owner match API before taking their surface session mutex, then validate a callback-stored local owner generation under the surface mutex before queueing. The owner exposes ble_app_owner_conn_matches(surface, conn, generation) to atomically match and capture the generation under the owner mutex, and connection generation increments skip zero so generation 0 remains an invalid sentinel. Race hooks in meshtastic_ble and meshcore_ble simulate owner disconnect/reconnect after owner match and prove stale writes are rejected instead of being queued with a new epoch.

Reviews: Kant/Sartre initially found P1 stale write race and P2 missing coverage after the first lock-order change. Rawls/Socrates final reviews found no P0/P1/P2 after the callback-generation design; Socrates P3 wraparound concern was fixed by skipping zero generation values.

Validation evidence: same EC2 runs recorded on project-LICHEN-t2hn.22.4. Full v3 affected-suite matrix passed 10/10, 143 cases, 9 skipped, 0 failures/errors/warnings in 512.82s. Final v4 targeted owner/generation suites passed 6/6, 63 cases, 6 skipped, 0 failures/errors/warnings in 243.20s.
close_reason: Completed: BLE owner/session lock ordering fixed with owner connection generation and stale-write race coverage; native_sim/Twister evidence recorded.
